## What

One-paragraph summary of the change.

## Why

The motivation. Link the issue if there is one.

## How tested

- [ ] `test/container/test.sh` passes locally (or you accept that CI will catch it)
- [ ] Browser-side change exercised on the phone form factor (if applicable)
- [ ] No new state files added without a corresponding `.gitignore` entry

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full test setup.
